message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Account {
    o AccountID : int
    o FirstName : string
    o LastName : string
    o EmailAddressUsername : string
    o password : string
    o AccountCreatedDatetime : datetime
    o isArchived : boolean
    createAccount()
    deleteAccount()
    editAccount()
    forgotPassword()
}

class Recipe {
    o recipeID : int
    o recipeName : string
    o servings : int
    o prepTime : time
    o cookTime : time
    o totalTime : time
    o isFavorite : boolean
    createRecipe()
    editRecipe()
    deleteRecipe()
    saveRecipe()
}

class RecipeImage {
    o RecipeImageID : int
    o RecipeImagePath : int
    o isArchived : boolean
    AddPhoto()
    DeletePhoto()
}

class Ingredient {
    o IngredientID : int
    o IngredientText : string
    o IngredientAmount : int
    o isArchived : boolean
    AddIngredient()
    EditIngredient()
    DeleteIngredient()
}

class Measurement {
    o MeasurementID : int
    o MeasurementText : string
    getMeasurement()
}

class Instructions {
    getSteps()
}

class Step {
    o StepID : int
    o InstructionStepText : string
    o StepNumberOrder : int
    o isArchived : boolean
    AddStep()
    EditStep()
    RemoveStep()
}

Account "0..*" -- "1" Recipe
Recipe "1" --o "1" RecipeImage
Recipe "1" *-- "*" Ingredient
Ingredient "1" *-- "1" Measurement
Recipe "1" *-- "1" Instructions
Instructions "1" *-- "*" Step

@enduml
```
